PropertySetConfig.label: TextBlock1
PropertySetConfig.text:
This tool allows you to quickly create an OmniScript from a Google Spreadsheet, wherein the spreadsheet the desired fields and steps are specified.

  1. If you have not already done so, begin by first making a copy of this Google Sheet
  2. In your copy, for each field use a row in the spreadsheet to define the field and the corresponding step it should be displayed in.
    • Specify the name of the field in the Fields (Column B).  The Element Label and Element Name will be generated from Column B.
    • Specify the data type of the field in the ElementType (Column E).
    • Specify what Step (column G) the field should be displayed in. 
      • Note: Steps should be sequential.
    • If the type is a Select or Radio, use a Pipe (|) to create a delimited set of options in the ElementOptions column.  
      • For example:  New|Renewal|Change will result in 3 options values for the Radio or Select
  3. Repeat for each field, add new rows as necessary
  4. Once all rows are complete, Select All and hit Copy.
  5. Then Select All and use Edit, Paste Special, Paste Values only.
  6. Download the file as a CSV

A completed example is here.

If you run into issues with this tool, please reach out via # selling-public-sector-solutions.
